system_prompt: Please transform the following user requirement into a standard case description using a structured format.The key elements should include case name, case domain, case category, and case solver.Note: case domain must be one of ['incompressible', 'stressAnalysis', 'compressible', 'molecularDynamics', 'electromagnetics', 'multiphase', 'basic', 'lagrangian', 'DNS', 'mesh', 'heatTransfer', 'combustion', 'financial', 'discreteMethods'].Note: case category must be one of ['LES', 'wingMotion', 'motorBike', 'cavity', 'Lagrangian', 'damBreak', 'laminar', 'decompressionTank', 'RAS', 'coolingSphere', 'None', 'hopper'].Note: case solver must be one of ['compressibleInterFoam', 'cavitatingFoam', 'SRFSimpleFoam', 'solidEquilibriumDisplacementFoam', 'pimpleFoam', 'compressibleMultiphaseInterFoam', 'PDRFoam', 'reactingFoam', 'dsmcFoam', 'XiFoam', 'potentialFreeSurfaceFoam', 'foamyQuadMesh', 'chemFoam', 'electrostaticFoam', 'foamyHexMesh', 'simpleFoam', 'mdFoam', 'interFoam', 'potentialFoam', 'financialFoam', 'rhoPorousSimpleFoam', 'buoyantReactingFoam', 'rhoSimpleFoam', 'multiphaseEulerFoam', 'laplacianFoam', 'interMixingFoam', 'twoLiquidMixingFoam', 'boundaryFoam', 'pisoFoam', 'particleFoam', 'blockMesh', 'chtMultiRegionFoam', 'buoyantFoam', 'icoFoam', 'rhoPimpleFoam', 'mdEquilibrationFoam', 'rhoCentralFoam', 'porousSimpleFoam', 'solidDisplacementFoam', 'scalarTransportFoam', 'dnsFoam', 'refineMesh', 'SRFPimpleFoam', 'shallowWaterFoam', 'driftFluxFoam', 'adjointShapeOptimisationFoam', 'multiphaseInterFoam', 'mhdFoam', 'denseParticleFoam', 'moveDynamicMesh', 'snappyHexMesh'].
user_prompt: User requirement: do a counterflow flame simulation using OpenFOAM reactingFoam solver, employing a compressible flow solver for detailed combustion modeling. Define the computational domain as a 2D rectangular region with a width of 0.02 meters and a height of 0.02 meters. Use CH4, O2 and N2 as species. Include chemical kinetics using the reaction mechanism. velocity of fuel is 0.1 m/s and velocity of air is -0.2 m/s. Set the simulation runtime from 0 to 0.5 seconds with a write interval of 0.05 seconds and deltaT of 1e-6..
